---
title: "Community"
description: "Explore how chen.ist engages with tech communities through knowledge sharing, open-source contributions, mentorship, and educational initiatives."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Our <span class="gr">Community</span></h1>
    <p>Building stronger tech communities through sharing, contribution, and mentorship.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Open source</h2>
    <p class="sub">Projects we've built and maintain for the community.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-exclamation"></i><h3>SecurityScan</h3><p>Automated security scanning for web apps. 150K+ downloads, 500+ GitHub stars.</p><a href="https://github.com/chenist/securityscan" target="_blank" class="m-lk">View on GitHub</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud-arrow-down"></i><h3>CloudCostMonitor</h3><p>Cloud spending optimization across providers. Used by 200+ organizations.</p><a href="https://github.com/chenist/cloudcostmonitor" target="_blank" class="m-lk">View on GitHub</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-book"></i><h3>DevSecurity Guide</h3><p>Comprehensive secure development guide. Translated into 5 languages.</p><a href="https://github.com/chenist/devsecurityguide" target="_blank" class="m-lk">View on GitHub</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-git"></i><h3>Core Contributions</h3><p>Security patches, performance fixes, and docs for popular open-source projects.</p><a href="https://github.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-lk">Our GitHub profile</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Events and meetups</h2>
    <p class="sub">Knowledge sharing and community building, in person and online.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-mic"></i><h3>SecureDev Conference</h3><p>Annual event with 500+ attendees from 20+ countries, 30+ expert speakers, workshops, and hands-on labs. Scholarship program for underrepresented groups.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud"></i><h3>Cloud Optimization Meetup</h3><p>Monthly hybrid gathering of cloud practitioners sharing real-world strategies for performance, cost, and security optimization.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cup-hot"></i><h3>Code and Coffee</h3><p>Weekly informal coding sessions open to all skill levels. Expert mentors available for guidance and collaborative problem-solving.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Education</h2>
    <p class="sub">Nurturing the next generation of technology professionals.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i><h3>CodeStart Bootcamp</h3><p>Free 8-week coding bootcamp for underrepresented groups. 150+ graduates, 85% job placement within 6 months.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-pc-display"></i><h3>Computer Club</h3><p>Year-round programming and robotics club for ages 8-18 in Bucharest, Cluj-Napoca, and Timisoara.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i><h3>Educator Resources</h3><p>Free, open-source teaching materials for K-12 and university computer science education.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i><h3>University Partnerships</h3><p>Guest lectures, curriculum development, internships, and research collaborations with top institutions.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Mentorship</h2>
    <p class="sub">Accelerating growth through structured guidance and support.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-person-lines-fill"></i><h3>Tech Mentorship Program</h3><p>Six-month cycles connecting experienced professionals with early-career technologists. Personalized development plans, regular check-ins, and progress tracking across technical skills, career development, and leadership.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-building-gear"></i><h3>Startup Guidance Program</h3><p>Quarterly cohorts of technical mentorship for founders. Architecture reviews, technology stack consultations, security planning, and technical due diligence preparation with monthly one-on-one sessions.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Industry partners</h2>
    <p class="sub">Collaborating to strengthen the technology ecosystem.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-building"></i><h3>Tech Association of Romania</h3><p>Industry advocacy and standards development.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-laptop"></i><h3>Digital Skills Coalition</h3><p>Digital literacy and workforce development.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i><h3>Cybersecurity Alliance</h3><p>Security awareness and education.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud-check"></i><h3>Cloud Native Foundation</h3><p>Open-source cloud technologies.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Get involved</h2>
    <p>Attend an event, contribute to a project, or become a mentor. There's a place for you.</p>
    <a href="/contact.html" class="m-b">Join our community</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Events &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Open source &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Mentorship
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
